title: Hold Your Enemies Closer: Unbound
description: Remove mutual exclusions from HYEC and vanilla enchantments
body:
# Hold Your Enemies Closer: Unbound
This is an optional datapack for Hold Your Enemies Closer designed to remove the restrictions on it and vanilla enchantments.
The changes are as follows:
- Auto-Smelt is no longer mutually exclusive with Fortune
- specific Protection enchantments are all no longer mutually exclusive with each other. However, Protection (the general enchantment) is mutually exclusive with specific Protections
- general Protection is slightly more effective
- Smite and Bane of Arthropods are no longer mutually exclusive with each other (Density and Breach aren't either, I'm not sure why they are in the first place)
- Sharpness is still mutually exclusive with the other damage enchantments, but is slightly stronger to make up for it
- Swift Swim is no longer mutually exclusive with Swift Sneak
- Infinity and Mending are no longer mutually exclusive
- Power, Infinity, Flame, Frost, Punch, and Pull can be put on crossbows
- Multishot and Piercing can be put on bows
- Piercing is no longer mutually exclusive with Multishot
- New enchantment: Fleetfeet. Goes on boots, makes you slightly faster.
- New enchantment: Magic protection. Goes on any armor, protects you from damage tagged `minecraft:witch_resistant_to` (except for Sonic Boom, because it's in `minecraft:bypasses_enchantments`).
- Ars Nouveau recipes for all Hold Your Enemies Closer enchantments! These recipes will disable themselves if Ars Nouveau isn't loaded.
- Horse and Wolf armors now support Chestplate and Boot enchantments - and they function!
